intro.name: Kritthapath Yaviraj
intro.description: IT student specializing in Web Development with experience in modern frameworks across desktop and mobile platforms. Proven ability to contribute to open-source projects, quickly adopt new technologies, and build robust web applications adhering to modern standards.

projects.name: Hack Club Thai Translation
bullets: Translated Hack Club Global site into Thai to expand accessibility for local students.

projects.name: Cartoon Office Word
bullets: Developed a foundational word processor application utilizing Visual Basic to understand core text rendering paradigms.

projects.name: Main Site (toonshou.in)
bullets: Personal Site used to show-off myself and share content across Modern Devices.
Maintained backward compatibility and modern design language.

projects.name: My other site (legacy.toonshou.in)
bullets: Attempt at writing a site with a different view, inspired by Neocities in the 90s.
Show-offs web technologies and limitations of that era.

projects.name: Linktree clone (card.toonshou.in)
bullets: Small site including all links for myself, accessible quickly by just scanning a qr-code.

technologies.details: TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, PHP, C, C++, SQL, Bash/Shell
SvelteKit, TailwindCSS, DaisyUI, Bootstrap, shadcn-svelte, Flask
AWS, Azure, Vercel, Cloudflare, Firebase, Docker, GitHub Actions, Git

bullets: Supported the IT for Education Department by maintaining computer hardware and performing system troubleshooting.
Implemented OCR workflows to digitize government documents, enhancing departmental efficiency and proof-checking accuracy.
